mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE DNAME LIKE '%학과'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STU(STUNO, NAME, GRADE, DEPTNO1, PROFNO) VALUES(#{stuNo},#{stuName},#{grade},#{deptNo},#{profNo})
INSERT INTO PROFESSOR(PROFNO, NAME, POSITION, PAY, DEPTNO) VALUES(#{profNo},#{profName},#{position},#{pay},#{deptNo})
